title: Asteroid Shiba (ASTEROID) Explodes Over 50,000% in 24 Hours - Meme Coin Mania Returns
excerpt: Asteroid Shiba has delivered astronomical gains with a staggering 50,532% surge in just 24 hours, propelling the meme coin into the top 800 cryptocurrencies by market cap. The dramatic price movement highlights the continued volatility and speculative nature of dog-themed tokens in the current market cycle.
